The scene appears to be from a horror or mystery video game with no camera movement or action occurring.

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view of a dimly lit interior room with historic stone architecture. A vintage CRT television displaying static sits on a wooden stand in the center, illuminated by a warm wall sconce on the left. The room features an arched stone doorway in the background, wooden furniture, and a blue carpet runner in the foreground. No movement or action occurs in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a dimly lit interior that emphasizes a heavy, atmospheric stillness. It begins by focusing on a vintage CRT television displaying white noise, which sits atop a wooden stand in the center of the room. The gaze lingers on the surrounding historic stone architecture, where a warm wall sconce on the left casts a soft glow across the space. This illumination extends toward a blue carpet runner in the foreground and an arched stone doorway in the background, framing the wooden furniture in a state of permanent suspension. The scene remains frozen in this eerie tableau, with no movement or action breaking the oppressive silence.
